title: Goose Origin
description: totally not untitled because the title is right there.
body:
Originally a Goose Origin mod that I made for a server I play on, adding a funnie little goose origin to your world. Seen as the goblin of the avian world, it prides itself in the mischief and mayhems it brings

Goose
Impact:🟡🟡

A more mischievous relative of the avians. They are considered the Goblins of the avian world

🟢 Winged — You have wings because you are a goose, simple as that.

🟢 Quickfooted — You are a bit faster than others, due to running away from people with brooms so much.

🟢 Emergency Exit — By hitting your ability key, you flap your wings and go straight into the air. Has a 30-second cooldown.

🟢 Intimidating stance — By fanning out your wings, it makes you look bigger than you really are. It freezes your opponent for 3 seconds, allowing you to get away.

🟡 Short stature — Sadly, Geese never were known for their height, meaning that you are 25% shorter than the average player.

🟡 A very stylish hat — You can sit on other players’ heads.

🟡 Bouyant body — When on the top of water, you don't sink.

🔴Unwieldy hands — Due to your wings, you aren't able to hold things like shields in your other hand.

🔴 Fragile — You have 3 fewer hearts of health than humans.

🔴 B o n k — You take more momentum damage
